info.title: Eiken Etymology Master API
info.description: API for VocaHack Eiken (英検) AI Skill to fetch English words, roots, affixes, compounds, and topic relations mapped against Eiken class lists.

get.summary: Fetch Japanese localized Eiken word etymology
get.description: Queries a specific word or root across Eiken libraries (e.g., eiken1, eikenjun1). Returns a combined family of words grouped by their common property (Root, Affix, Compound, Topic).

parameters.name: word
parameters.description: The target English word or word root to be analyzed.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Target Eiken word version table. Default: eiken1. Allowed: eiken1, eiken2, eiken3, eiken4, eiken5, eikenjun1, eikenjun2, eikenjun2p.

200.description: Successfully retrieved etymology cluster data for Eiken.

grouped_words.description: List of words sharing the same etymology trace or root string, meant to be grouped by AI using the 'mark' attribute mapping to [語源/接辞/複合語/話題].

404.description: Word not found in the specified database.
